notes: Email enrichment via Google browser search. Most small local businesses don't publish email addresses publicly. Brave Search API key was missing so web_search was unavailable. Google/Yelp/DDG were used via browser and web_fetch where possible.

summary.limitations: Brave Search API key missing. Google/Yelp/DuckDuckGo rate-limited after a few searches. Facebook blocks web_fetch. Most small local businesses don't publish email addresses online - they rely on phone calls. To find more emails, consider: 1) Configure Brave API key for web_search, 2) Use a lead enrichment API (Hunter.io, Apollo, etc.), 3) Check Facebook pages via browser (requires login), 4) Call businesses directly to ask for email.
